start.speaker: fenrick
start.text: Patrol ahead. Two soldiers at the bridge. The children are behind the rock — they're quiet, but the little ones are shaking.

options.text: I'll circle around and create a distraction. When they move, you cross with the kids.
[Persuasion] Let me talk to them. I'll say I'm a merchant looking for the Eastern Road inn.
Two soldiers. We can take them quietly.
Forget the bridge. We cut through the forest.
[Betray] Actually, I'll go talk to those soldiers. About you.

stealth_attempt.speaker: narrator
stealth_attempt.text: You creep through the underbrush, snapping a branch deliberately fifty yards downstream. The soldiers turn, lanterns swinging. Fenrick moves like shadow — the children cling to his coat as they dash across the bridge.

stealth_result.speaker: fenrick
stealth_result.text: Clean. Not a sound. You're better at this than most Hand operatives. Crow's Rest is just over the next hill.

bluff_attempt.speaker: narrator
bluff_attempt.text: You approach the soldiers with an easy stride, hands visible. The taller one narrows his eyes but lets you talk. Your story holds — barely. They wave you past, grumbling about lost merchants.

bluff_success.speaker: fenrick
bluff_success.text: Silver tongue. I'm impressed. While you had their attention, we slipped past downstream. The kids are already at Crow's Rest.

fight_warning.speaker: fenrick
fight_warning.text: If we fight, we fight silent. One shout and every patrol within a mile converges on us. And the children watch. They've seen enough killing.

options.text: Knock them out. No killing in front of the kids.
Dead men tell no tales. Quick and clean.

fight_nonlethal_result.speaker: fenrick
fight_nonlethal_result.text: Tied and gagged. They'll wake up with headaches and a story no one will believe. Let's move — Crow's Rest is close.

fight_lethal_result.speaker: fenrick
fight_lethal_result.text: Done. The girl saw it. She didn't scream — she's seen worse. That's the worst part. Let's go. Crow's Rest is close.

thornwood_reroute_react.speaker: fenrick
thornwood_reroute_react.text: Through Thornwood? At night? With children? You're insane. But the bridge is a death trap... Fine. Stay close. Everyone holds hands. No one lets go, no matter what they hear.

safe_arrival.speaker: fenrick
safe_arrival.text: There. The lantern in the window — that's the signal. The safe house mother will take them from here. New names, new village, new life.

children_farewell.speaker: narrator
children_farewell.text: The twelve-year-old girl turns at the door. She doesn't smile — children from Ironmarch don't smile easily. But she nods. Once. And then the door closes, and they're gone.

fenrick_reflection.speaker: fenrick
fenrick_reflection.text: That's seven this year. Seven out of thousands. It's not enough. It's never enough. But it's something.

betrayal_scene.speaker: fenrick
betrayal_scene.text: You... you piece of — RUN! Kids, RUN!

betrayal_aftermath.speaker: narrator
betrayal_aftermath.text: The soldiers move fast. Fenrick fights — breaks one soldier's nose — but they overwhelm him. The children scream. The Ironmarch captain hands you a pouch of gold and a receipt. 'Smugglers and contraband,' he writes. Contraband. He means the children.
